title: Donuts & More
description: Adds many donuts (based off of ores) as well as some other cute things like coffee, hot chocolate, and a berry muffin.
body: This is just a simple mod that adds some edible items mostly centered around donuts! There are also donut holes, coffee, hot chocolate, a berry muffin, and a craftable coffee mug! You can craft dough with wheat and milk and then donuts with sugar and dough. Also, when you craft a donut, you get a donut hole left behind as well! Then you can craft those donuts and donut holes with some ores individually to get ore variants! You can also craft the berry muffin with wheat, sugar, milk, and a berry to get 4 muffins! To craft a coffee mug just use 3 clay balls like you would craft a bucket. Hot chocolate is crafted with a mug, sugar, milk, and cocoa beans. Black coffee is crafted with a mug, water, and cocoa beans. Coffee with creamer is crafted with black coffee, milk, and sugar.
